summary: Implementation review approved for GH-105 implementation head cd137702cc0a3393460d87931c0af0a806c5898e. The change adds dependency-free Core helpers for terminal success and structured failure envelopes, records terminal result/failure fields through the existing Run Record store, tightens schema/fixture coverage, and leaves API query/App/Harbor/Lode/real execution/storage/write behavior out of scope.
